title: Orthad Overset Canonization
canonized_behavior: Orthad overset dual-lens readout: same-chart self-read preserves diagonal trace; cross-chart transfer generates finite Fourier transfer; reverse-transfer quadratic self-twist generates Gauss diagonal.
scope: Canonical for finite cyclic orientation carriers; N-general stability sweep reserved for Phase 5 v3.
next_target: Phase 5 v3: General N Stability Test
